library-item.title: MEDICAL2
library-item.description: Making Data Function for realtionship between medical condition 2 and CLL data table

library-item.title: MEDICAL CONDITION 2
library-item.description: Making Data Function for realtionship between medical condition 2 and CLL data table

library-item.title: ProductGroup
library-item.description: Needs to get executed whenever product group filter is applied

library-item.title: Update Case Details Link
library-item.description: This functuon will trigger the ironpython script if the report has been generate using ICR alert and not the alert has been archived
